title: ENBD X BusinessOnline
subtitle: Corporate & Institutional Banking
description: Led the design team for Emirates NBD's corporate banking suite, overseeing end-to-end UX enhancement and reskinning of business banking platforms across desktop and mobile. Shaped branding and communication templates while guiding a team of 8 designers.

title: MetLife APAC
subtitle: Customer Portal Audit
description: Reviewed and assessed core service experiences across MetLife's India, Japan, and Korea customer portals. Identified opportunity spaces, delivered recommendations, wireframes, and prototypes.

title: Grow with Google
subtitle: Digital Skills Platform · Google APAC
description: Design lead for Google's free digital skills initiative in APAC. Crafted an intuitive platform experience for courses, tools, and certifications empowering individuals and businesses across the region.

title: Emirates NBD Wealth
subtitle: Wealth Management App
description: Led the design and delivery of the wealth section of the ENBD mobile app. Responsible for experience design and user research across asset details, local and international equities trading, mutual funds discovery, market sections, and watchlists.

title: Grab Merchant Center
subtitle: Merchant Resource Platform · Grab
description: Worked with Grab's marketing, product, and merchant engagement teams to design a merchant resource center — a primary source for all merchant-related information, brand assets, and industry reports.

title: Client Insights
subtitle: AI-Driven Analytics · Standard Chartered
description: Led end-to-end experience design of an AI-driven client insights product for Standard Chartered, powered by Squirro AI. An 8-month engagement recognized with two financial services industry awards.

title: C3.ai Credit Application
subtitle: Enterprise AI · Standard Chartered
description: Led the design of a business credit application for Standard Chartered using C3.ai Enterprise AI. Transformed complex machine learning output into a user-friendly experience for credit decisioning teams.

title: Blacksmith KYC
subtitle: Identity Verification · ING Innovation Lab
description: Design director for a KYC initiative at ING Innovation Lab. Delivered brand identity, strategy, usability testing, and a comprehensive design system over a 6-month engagement, guiding a full MVP redesign.

title: Baby Lion Studio
subtitle: Design Direction · Multiple Clients
description: Leading a remote design studio delivering branding, web, and mobile experiences for clients including Abu Dhabi Ports, Mubadala, Montblanc, Regily AB, Hult Business School, Alef Group, and Karmalulu.

title: Joist
subtitle: SaaS Product Design · EverCommerce
description: Designed and delivered major product features across iOS, Android, and web for Joist's contractor management platform. Resulted in a 10% conversion rate lift and 30% increase in revenue.

title: HSBC Robo-Advisor
subtitle: Multilingual iPad App · HSBC
description: Led ideation, concept exploration, and solution design for a multilingual HSBC iPad robo-advisor, guiding users through investment advisory with an intuitive conversational interface.

title: Sony PlayStation Kiosk
subtitle: Retail Experience · Sony
description: Designed the product and customer experience for Sony PlayStation's retail kiosk, creating an engaging in-store touchpoint that showcases games and accessories.

title: ADGM
subtitle: Product Architecture · Abu Dhabi Global Market
description: Collaborated with UX designers, product managers, and stakeholders to visualize the product user flow and architecture. Mentored junior designers on creating mockups and prototypes.

title: Immersive Experiences
subtitle: AR, VR & MultiTaction · BUT
description: Designed AR, VR, and MultiTaction experiences for the Louvre Museum Abu Dhabi, Etisalat at GITEX 2017, and Nakheel at Cityscape Global 2017.

title: LINE Messenger
subtitle: UX Research · MENA Region
description: Conducted generative, ethnographic user research to evaluate new and existing features for the MENA region. Ran usability tests on LINE LIVE and performed competitive analysis of emerging competition.
